suppress.notes: False positive: CVEs for MariaDB Server incorrectly matched to Quarkus JDBC driver. The driver does not contain MariaDB server code.

False positive: CVE-2026-33186 affects gRPC-Go (Go language implementation). CPE in NVD uses target_sw=go qualifier. These are gRPC-Java JARs (io.grpc), which are a completely separate implementation unaffected by this CVE.

False positive: OWASP matches Quarkus version 3.34.6 as if it were Infinispan Server version 3.34.6 (which does not exist; Infinispan uses 16.x versioning). quarkus-infinispan-client is a thin Quarkus extension, not the Infinispan server.

False positive: OWASP matches Quarkus version 3.34.6 as if it were MongoDB server version 3.34.6 (which does not exist; MongoDB uses 6.x/7.x versioning). quarkus-mongodb-client is a thin Quarkus extension, not the MongoDB server.
